zh.lifeSummary: 當Johana Baugh於1543年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親Mr John Baugh20歲，母親Mrs John Baugh14歲。她於1568年9月9日與John Watkins在英國英格蘭賀福爾波斯波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1581年在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: Baugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: probably an Anglicized form of Bach , from Welsh bach ‘little’.

variants.name: Bach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Johann, Alfons, Bernhard, Erna, Ernst.

German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream, Middle High German bach ‘stream’. This surname is also found in some other European countries, most notably in Denmark and France (Alsace and Lorraine), but also in e.g. the Netherlands, Czechia (see also 5 below), and Croatia.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Bach ‘stream, creek’.

nameMeanings.name: Johana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johana Baugh was born in 1543, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Mr John Baugh, was 20 and her mother, Mrs John Baugh, was 14. She married John Watkins on 9 September 1568, in Bosbury, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1581, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johana Baugh est née en 1543, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mr John Baugh, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Baugh, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé John Watkins le 9 septembre 1568, à Bosbury, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1581, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johana Baugh 1543 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mr John Baugh 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs John Baugh 14. Sie hat am 9. September 1568 in Bosbury, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom John Watkins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1581 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johana Baugh è nata il nel 1543 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Mr John Baugh, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mrs John Baugh, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato John Watkins il 9 settembre 1568, nel Bosbury, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1581, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johana Baughが1543年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Mr John Baughは20歳，母Mrs John Baughは14歳であった。1568年9月9日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアボスブリーでJohn Watkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1581年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johana Baugh(이)가 1543년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mr John Baugh(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs John Baugh(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1568년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 보스버이에서 John Watkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1581년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johana Baugh nasceu em 1543, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mr John Baugh, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Baugh, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com John Watkins em 9 de setembro de 1568, em Bosbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1581, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johana Baugh родилась в 1543 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Mr John Baugh было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Baugh, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Watkins 9 сентября 1568 г. в местности босбури, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1581 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
